sections.content:
Now I see changes:
- Player moved from cols 10-13 to cols 14-17 (RIGHT by 4)
- Green strip moved from cols 8-9 to cols 12-13 (RIGHT by 4)
- White area 3 (bottom) expanded from cols 0-7 to cols 0-11
- White area 2 (middle) shrank from cols 0-7 to cols 0-3 (rows 28-35 only)
So clicking the bottom blue target moved the player RIGHT by 4 cells. This is consistent with Level 1 where clicking the upper blue moved right. But wait, in Level 1 the player was in the bottom white area and clicking the upper blue (which was in the top white area) moved the player right.
Let me reconsider. In Level 1:
- Upper blue (rows 24-27) → RIGHT
- Lower blue (rows 32-35) → LEFT
In Level 2, clicking the bottom blue (rows 44-47) moved RIGHT. So the direction might depend on which side the blue targets are on. In Level 1, blue targets were on the RIGHT side, and upper=right, lower=left. In Level 2, blue targets are on the LEFT side, and bottom=right.
Actually, maybe the rule is simpler: clicking a blue target moves the player TOWARD that target. In Level 1, the upper blue was at rows 24-27, cols 60-63 (right side), so clicking it moved the player right. The lower blue was at rows 32-35, cols 60-63 (also right side but lower), so clicking it moved the player left... wait, that doesn't make sense.
Let me reconsider. In Level 1, the player was at rows 44-49. The upper blue was at rows 24-27 (above the player) and lower blue at rows 32-35 (also above the player). Clicking upper blue moved player RIGHT, clicking lower blue moved player LEFT.
In Level 2, the player is at rows 52-57. The blue targets are at rows 16-19, 24-27, 36-39, 44-47 (all above the player). Clicking the bottom blue (rows 44-47, closest to player) moved player RIGHT.
Hmm, maybe the rule is: clicking a blue target moves the player in the direction of the target's horizontal position relative to the player. In Level 1, blue targets were to the RIGHT of the player, so clicking them moved the player right... but the lower blue moved left.
Wait, let me re-examine Level 1. The player started at cols 46-49. The blue targets were at cols 60-63. Clicking upper blue moved player to cols 50-53 (right by 4). Clicking lower blue moved player to cols 46-49 (left by 4).
Actually, I think I need to reconsider. Maybe the blue targets have different effects based on their vertical position relative to some reference point. Or maybe there's a pattern I'm missing.
For now, I know that clicking the bottom blue target (rows 44-47) moves the player RIGHT. I need to move the player to align with the green gap at cols 28-29. Currently player is at cols 14-17. I need to move right by 14 cells, which is about 3-4 more clicks.
But wait, I also clicked the upper blue target earlier and it didn't move the player, it just expanded the top white area. So different blue targets have different effects.
Let me try clicking the other blue targets to see their effects. But first, let me continue moving the player right using the bottom blue target.
Actually, let me be more careful. I need to figure out which blue target moves the player LEFT (the opposite direction). Let me try the second blue target from the bottom (rows 36-39).
